bird.name: Palawan hornbill
bird.summary: The Palawan hornbill (Anthracoceros marchei) is a large forest bird endemic to the Philippines. It is one of the 11 endemic hornbills in th…

locations.name: 巴拉望省
locations.summary: 巴拉望省（Palawan），是菲律宾民马罗巴区下属的一个省，由主岛巴拉望岛，以及周边的卡拉棉群岛（1,753平方公里）、库约群岛、巴拉巴克岛等小岛组成，南隔巴拉巴克海峡与加里曼丹岛相望。另外，菲律宾声称部分南沙群岛（卡拉延群島）也归属该省…

locations.name: 巴拉巴克岛
locations.summary: 巴拉巴克島（Balabac Island），位於菲律賓巴拉望省（Palawan）西南部、馬來西亞東北部的島嶼。 全島最高點海拔576公尺（1,890呎），由北至南長約31公里，寬約17公里。西北岸有沼澤，西部岸外有珊瑚礁，主要出產椰果、珍…

relations.subject: Palawan hornbill
relations.evidence: It is only found in Palawan and the nearby islands of Balabac, Busuanga, Calauit, Culion and Coron

relations.subject: Palawan hornbill
relations.evidence: It inhabits primary and secondary dipterocarp forest, mangrove swamps and forest edge up to 900 meters above sea level

relations.subject: Palawan hornbill
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss, hunting and trapping for the cage-bird trade
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

relations.subject: Palawan hornbill
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat destruction through logging, conversion into agricultural land or urban development and mining
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
